metadata.cache_message: This response is cached and accessible via the URL below for 24 hours at no extra cost. The cache is for request tracing only — it doesn't affect the API's data freshness and won't be returned through the API again.

caption.text:
Introducing GPT-Live, a new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction.

Rolling out in ChatGPT starting today.

GPT-Live makes talking with AI feel like having a real conversation. It’s also our smartest voice model yet.

It’s built on a full-duplex architecture, meaning it can listen and speak at the same time. This allows the model to engage in more natural back-and-forth, maintain a better sense of time, and even perform live translation.

A good voice model should be enjoyable to talk to, and GPT-Live is a great conversationalist with a more natural and defined personality than previous voice models.

For questions that require web search, deeper reasoning, or more complex work, GPT-Live can delegate to our latest frontier model behind the scenes, and brings the result back into the conversation when it’s ready.

These new models are rolling out now to everyone in ChatGPT across iOS, Android, and web. Coming soon to the API.

Just tap the Voice button to talk with ChatGPT, and you’ll get the new experience powered by GPT-Live.
caption.text_translation:
Introducing GPT-Live, a new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction. 

 Rolling out in ChatGPT starting today. 

 GPT-Live makes talking with AI feel like having a real conversation. It’s also our smartest voice model yet. 

 It’s built on a full-duplex architecture, meaning it can listen and speak at the same time. This allows the model to engage in more natural back-and-forth, maintain a better sense of time, and even perform live translation. 

 A good voice model should be enjoyable to talk to, and GPT-Live is a great conversationalist with a more natural and defined personality than previous voice models. 

 For questions that require web search, deeper reasoning, or more complex work, GPT-Live can delegate to our latest frontier model behind the scenes, and brings the result back into the conversation when it’s ready. 

 These new models are rolling out now to everyone in ChatGPT across iOS, Android, and web. Coming soon to the API. 

 Just tap the Voice button to talk with ChatGPT, and you’ll get the new experience powered by GPT-Live.

caption.text: When you’re ready for fewer rate limits and interruptions, just complete the agent import flow in onboarding or go to Settings → General and press “Import agent setup.”

What started as a neighborhood surf school has grown into a cornerstone of the Rockaway Beach community.

Since launching Locals Surf School in 2012, Mike and Mike have expanded to include the Locals Collective coffee shop and Connolly’s, a beloved neighborhood bar and music venue. Along the way, ChatGPT has become their always-available advisor, helping them manage all three businesses.

They use it to:
- Forecast surf conditions and build instructor schedules
- Manage payroll, inventory, and emails
- Navigate permits and local regulations
- Solve operational challenges across all three businesses

The best part? By handling the day-to-day operational work, ChatGPT gives Mike and Mike more time to focus on their customers and community. 

How are you using ChatGPT to get your time back?
How does ChatGPT remember important details about you? Through a process called dreaming. Here’s how it works.

“When I started planning my wedding, I knew I wanted to make my dress from scratch. I’ve sewn before but this was by far the most ambitious project I’d attempted. I wanted something historically-inspired, deeply personal, and unlike anything I could have bought- including incorporating pearls from my grandmother’s necklace.

Because I was using some pretty niche historical sewing techniques with very little information online, I spent months going back and forth with ChatGPT asking super specific questions, troubleshooting construction details, and slowly turning my idea into a real dress. It covered everything from helping me upgrade my sewing machine, to historical corset construction. It even helped me figure out what shape to cut my veil and figure out how pack up all the orchids I’d been growing and travel with them to use in my bouquet. The list goes on and on and on.

For me one of the most exciting things about AI is that it helps me go deeper into my real world hobbies. I can take on projects that would have felt impossible before, and I can make things that are more personal, and more my own.” -@emmadahlart

Big Chan was making moves in hip-hop, but her biggest breakthrough came after the music stopped. With her career at a crossroads, she moved to Atlanta, found a sewing machine in a friend’s attic, and taught herself a new craft.

Inspired to design by her mother’s legendary disco style, Chan uses ChatGPT to help refine her sketches and bring her visions to life.  She continues to create her own opportunities within the fashion industry, now dressing some of entertainment’s biggest names.
Matte black and chrome is back. ⚫️⚡️

Now in preview: a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT.

Plus and Pro users in the U.S. can now securely connect financial accounts, see where their money is going, and ask questions based on the information they choose to connect. 

Ask things like:
- What subscriptions am I paying for? 
- How much will I need to save to retire at my current spending rate? 
- What are the 3 easiest changes I could make to my spending with the most impact? 
- What IS a Roth IRA and am I even doing it right? 

Everyone deserves access to answers about their finances, so we’re working hard to expand to more users soon.
caption.text_translation:
Now in preview: a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT. 

 Plus and Pro users in the U.S. can now securely connect financial accounts, see where their money is going, and ask questions based on the information they choose to connect.

caption.text:
For James Costello, demolition has always been about understanding how things come together before taking them apart. As a structural engineer overseeing some of New York City’s most complex high-rise demolition projects, he brings years of experience, precision, and problem-solving into every project.

Beyond the skyline, James is also growing DEMTEC, a demolition business built from his family’s roots in the industry. But running a business means managing much more than what happens on site — from estimating and contracts to compliance documents and construction plans, there is an entire world of work behind every project.

Today, James uses ChatGPT to help navigate that complexity. From reviewing lengthy contracts and identifying important details to organizing documentation and creating construction plans, ChatGPT helps him move through critical workflows faster and with more confidence.

By combining decades of industry knowledge with new technology, James is creating more space to grow his business, support his team, and spend time with the people who matter most.
